name: local-voice-ai
description: Fully offline push-to-talk dictation, voice commands, and AI prompting for VS Code, powered by whisper.cpp. No data leaves the machine.

commands.title: Voice AI: Install / Update whisper.cpp + Model

localVoiceAI.whisperBinaryPath.description: Absolute path to whisper-cli (whisper-cli.exe on Windows). Leave blank to auto-detect or auto-install.

localVoiceAI.whisperModelPath.description: Absolute path to a ggml Whisper model, e.g. ggml-base.en-q5_1.bin. Leave blank to auto-download.

localVoiceAI.language.description: Language code passed to whisper.cpp (-l). Use 'auto' to autodetect.

localVoiceAI.aiChatCommand.description: Optional VS Code command ID to invoke with the transcript after recording (e.g. 'workbench.action.chat.open'). Leave blank to insert at the cursor instead.

localVoiceAI.streamingPreview.description: Show interim transcription in the status bar during recording (chunked preview).

localVoiceAI.streamingChunkSeconds.description: How often (seconds) to transcribe an interim chunk while recording.

localVoiceAI.voiceCommandsEnabled.description: If a transcript matches a voice-command pattern, execute the command instead of inserting text.

localVoiceAI.voiceCommands.description: Custom voice commands merged with built-ins. Each entry: { pattern, command, args? }. 'pattern' is a case-insensitive regex matched against the transcript.

localVoiceAI.autoStopOnSilence.description: Automatically stop recording after a silence window. Gives 'press-once' UX.

localVoiceAI.silenceThresholdDb.description: Peak energy (dBFS) below which audio counts as silence.

localVoiceAI.silenceDurationMs.description: Duration of continuous silence (ms) that triggers auto-stop.

localVoiceAI.wakeOnVoice.description: Continuously listen and auto-start recording when voice energy is detected.

localVoiceAI.wakeThresholdDb.description: Peak energy (dBFS) that triggers wake activation.

localVoiceAI.wakeDurationMs.description: Duration of sustained voice (ms) required to trigger wake activation.
